choiceresponse.label: Which of the following are acceptable ways to collaborate?

checkboxgroup.choice: Working jointly to develop an overall approach to an assignment
Answering a question by copying what someone else wrote and changing a word or two.
Posting answers to a problem before the deadline
Getting hints from peers or course staff if you’re stuck

div.p: You are encouraged to interact with your classmates, and to talk with people outside the course about course material. Copying material from any source, whether classmates or AI, is not allowed.
